Return to shop ABOUT US NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL | Good Coffee for Good Life NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL is a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand that applies freeze-drying technology – a modern method that preserves the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans . We offer a convenient, sophisticated, and authentically Vietnamese coffee experience, where each small coffee capsule contains a story of Vietnamese identity, creativity, and pride. NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL aims to spread national pride through every drop of exquisite coffee, so that Vietnamese people can enjoy the taste of Vietnam, and the world can remember Vietnam through the taste of authentic coffee. Beyond simply delivering quality products, NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL aims for a new lifestyle – where coffee is not just a beverage, but a bridge connecting people, emotions, and cultures. More than just coffee, it’s a symbol of the connection between tradition and modernity, between refined taste and a dynamic global lifestyle. Coffee Production Process Vision As a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand in applying freeze-drying technology – a modern method that helps preserve the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans. A trusted partner in the international market. A modern coffee culture icon , representing the Vietnamese spirit – simplicity, creativity, and sustainability. Mission “Spreading the flavors of Vietnam – elevating the Vietnamese coffee experience on the world map.” NONLA GLOBAL aims to bring Vietnamese coffee closer to international friends with its products: Pure – Authentic taste – Easy to prepare (dissolves quickly in cold or hot water). No sugar – No coffee machine needed – No waiting – perfect for modern life. Helping people, everywhere, enjoy the authentic taste of Vietnamese coffee in just seconds. Core Values Made from pure Robusta coffee beans from the Central Highlands region – roasted and dried according to international standards. Freeze-drying technology preserves the structure, aroma, and flavor of coffee – ensuring a perfect cup of coffee anytime, anywhere. Each NONLA coffee capsule is designed for easy brewing and portability, perfect for anyone who wants a quick and convenient option. 6 roasting levels – 4 distinctive flavors representing the diversity and creativity in Vietnamese coffee culture. We are committed to using clean raw materials , practicing environmentally friendly production methods , and supporting the sustainable development of coffee farming communities . Certificates – Certifications International standard for quality management systems ISO 22000:2018 We confirm that the entire production process complies with international Halal standards. 1 Ingredient Robusta coffee beans are sourced from renowned growing regions in Vietnam, ensuring firm beans, high caffeine content, and a rich flavor. Each batch of raw materials is checked for moisture content, aroma, and thoroughly cleaned of impurities before being used in production. 2 Harvest The coffee cherries are harvested selectively. Only ripe, high-quality red cherries are picked. This harvesting method ensures consistent quality in the batch, and allows green cherries more time to ripen. 3 Roasting & Grinding Coffee Each batch of coffee is roasted using a specific temperature profile to highlight the strong and aromatic flavor of Robusta. The coffee is then finely ground to ensure quick dissolution and preserve the full aroma during the freeze-drying process. Coffee Production Process 4 Freeze-drying technology The coffee extract is frozen at extremely low temperatures, then dried in a vacuum to allow water to evaporate directly from solid to vapor without passing through a liquid phase. This process preserves the original aroma, color, and flavor of the coffee, resulting in a dry, porous powder that dissolves quickly in cold water. 5 Quality Control After drying, the product undergoes rigorous testing: moisture content measurement, solubility testing, flavor evaluation, microbiological testing, and sensory evaluation. Only batches that meet the standards are moved to the packaging stage. This step demonstrates NONLA GLOBAL’s commitment to providing products that are not only delicious but also clean and safe. 6 Packaging & Storage The coffee is packaged in convenient forms – capsules, small boxes, or premium gift sets – suitable for both daily enjoyment and gifting. Finally, the product is stored in a cool, dry environment and is ready for distribution. nonla NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL is a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand that applies freeze-drying technology to preserve the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans. “Premium Co

Return to shop Cart No products in the cart. Return to shop FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQ) At nonlacafe , we combine the rich heritage of Vietnamese coffee with modern convenience. We know that the best coffee should be simple, bold, and accessible everywhere. Below are the answers to the most common questions about our brand. ☕ THE “NO MACHINE” EXPERIENCE Do I really not need a machine to enjoy nonlacafe? That is correct! Our capsules are designed for ultimate portability and simplicity. You don’t need a Nespresso, Keurig, or any expensive espresso hardware. How it works: Simply peel back the seal of the capsule, pour the premium coffee into a cup, and add 150ml – 200ml of hot or cold water/milk. Stir and enjoy! Can I use nonlacafe for Iced Coffee? Absolutely. Our coffee dissolves perfectly in cold liquids. To make a traditional Vietnamese Iced Coffee ( Cà Phê Đá ), just pour the capsule over ice, add water, and stir. For a creamier experience, add condensed milk or your favorite plant-based creamer. 🍃 OUR COFFEE & ORIGIN Where is nonlacafe coffee sourced? Our coffee is 100% sourced from the Đắk Lắk highlands of Vietnam. Known as the “Coffee Capital of Southeast Asia,” this region’s volcanic soil and ideal altitude produce beans with a deep, complex flavor profile that you won’t find anywhere else. Is it Arabica or Robusta? We believe in the power of the Signature Vietnamese Blend . While many brands use only Arabica, we use a curated blend of Specialty Grade Arabica and Fine Robusta . Arabica brings delicate acidity and floral aromas. Fine Robusta provides the bold body, chocolatey notes, and the rich “kick” that Vietnamese coffee is famous for. How much caffeine is in each capsule? Because we use high-quality Vietnamese Robusta, our capsules pack a punch. Each capsule contains approximately 100mg – 150mg of caffeine —providing a clean, powerful energy boost that is significantly higher than standard 100% Arabica pods. Are there any additives or sugar? No. Our coffee is 100% pure coffee . The notes of dark chocolate and roasted nuts are the natural flavor characteristics of the beans and our specialized roasting process. No artificial flavors, no GMOs, and no added sugar. Is your packaging eco-friendly? Yes. We are committed to protecting the environment. Our capsules are made from plant-based, home-compostable materials . Unlike traditional aluminum or plastic pods, they are designed to break down naturally in a compost environment. ✈️ SHIPPING & FULFILLMENT Where do you ship from? To ensure the freshest coffee and fastest delivery, we fulfill orders from two locations: Directly from our origin facility in Vietnam. From our Amazon fulfillment centers (FBA) and warehouses in the USA and Canada. What are the shipping costs? We offer free standard shipping on qualifying orders: USA & Canada: FREE on orders over $100 USD . International: FREE on orders over $200 USD . For orders below these amounts, shipping is calculated at checkout based on your location. How long will it take to receive my order? Fulfillment from US/Canada hubs: 3–7 business days. Direct shipping from Vietnam: 10–21 business days. You will receive a tracking number via email as soon as your order is dispatched. 🛍️ ORDERS & REFUNDS Can I return my coffee if I change my mind? 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee Try Nonla Coffee risk-free. If you’re not satisfied for any reason, you can request a full refund within 30 days of delivery . Just email us with your order number and we’ll take care of the rest. No stress. No risk. Just great coffee. What if my order arrives damaged? If your capsules arrive damaged or if you received the incorrect item, please contact us at [email protected] within 48 hours of delivery. Please provide your order number and a photo of the damage, and we will arrange a replacement or refund immediately. Can I cancel my order? You can cancel your order for a full refund as long as the shipping label has not yet been created. Once the order has entered our logistics chain (especially for international shipments from Vietnam), we are unable to cancel or recall the package. ☕ AoDai Coffee vs Nonla Coffee Everything you need to know about AoDai Coffee and Nonla Coffee in one place. 🇻🇳 What Do AoDai Coffee & Nonla Coffee Have in Common? Both product lines share the same core benefits: ⚡ Strong Vietnamese Robusta High caffeine for real energy ⏱ Ready in Seconds Just add water and stir 💧 Hot or Cold Ready Works with hot or cold water 🎒 Convenient Anywhere Perfect for office, travel, gym ❄️ Freeze-Dried Technology Better flavor, instant dissolve 🚫 No Machine Needed No brewing equipment required 🔍 What’s the Difference? 🇻🇳 AoDai Coffe
